title: AI-Powered Procurement Marketplace | Aigorai
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
B2B Procurement Marketplace
Your Private
Procurement Marketplace
Aigorai is a private B2B marketplace purpose-built for indirect and tail spend. We combine a pre-vetted supplier catalogue, AI-powered autonomous sourcing, and real-time spend analytics—all in one platform.
For CPOs and procurement leaders, this means: full visibility into fragmented spend, guaranteed compliance , and measurable savings —without adding headcount to your team.
How It Works
Get Started
Search Marketplace
"Ergonomic office chairs for 50 employees"
AI Response
Found 4 compliant suppliers. Best: €12,450 (23% savings)
Status
Order placed. Delivery: March 12
Why Aigorai One Platform. Complete Control.
Stop chasing tail spend across spreadsheets, credit cards, and expense reports. Aigorai gives you a single view of all indirect procurement.
Vendor Aggregator
1,000+ suppliers consolidated into one vendor master entry. One contract, one invoice, one relationship to manage.
Explore Vendor Aggregation
Autonomous Sourcing
AI-powered Digital Sourcing Desk. When users can't find what they need, our AI automatically sources it from vetted suppliers.
Discover AI Sourcing
Built-In Compliance
Every supplier pre-vetted for ESG, financial stability, and quality certifications. Compliance by design, not afterthought.
View Compliance Features
10-40%
Price Savings
70%
Process Cost Reduction
1,000+
Pre-Vetted Suppliers
100%
Compliance Rate
Two Pillars of Savings
Our marketplace delivers value through both direct price savings AND dramatic process cost reduction through AI automation.
Price Savings
By aggregating demand across all our marketplace clients, we negotiate volume discounts you could never achieve alone. Typical savings: 10-40% depending on category.
Pre-negotiated framework agreements
Volume pooling across clients
Competitive micro-tenders for spot buys
Process Automation Savings
AI eliminates manual procurement tasks. From requisition to payment, we automate the entire workflow. Process cost reduction: up to 70% .
Automated supplier matching & RFQs
Touchless PO and invoice processing
AI-powered approval workflows
Ready to Transform Your Tail Spend?
Talk to our team of procurement veterans. We'll show you exactly how the Aigorai marketplace can work for your organization.
Request Consultation
